nodes.label: drizzle.config.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM config pointing at lib/db/schema.ts with PostgreSQL dialect and local db credentials.

nodes.label: list_models.js
nodes.summary: Standalone script that queries SiliconFlow API to list available DeepSeek models.

nodes.label: next.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Next.js config that imports dns-patch.mjs before exporting an otherwise empty config object.

nodes.label: lib/dns-patch.mjs
nodes.summary: DNS patching module loaded at Next.js startup to fix DNS resolution issues.

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for IntelliRender Next.js app with Vercel AI SDK, Drizzle ORM, MCP SDK, Three.js, and Shadcn UI dependencies.

nodes.label: .vscode/settings.json
nodes.summary: VSCode workspace settings configuring Live Server port to 5501.

nodes.label: app/layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root Next.js layout with dark mode classes and metadata titled 'Visual Response Engine'.

nodes.label: app/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Root page component managing active chat state and rendering Sidebar alongside ChatWindow.

nodes.label: app/api/chat/route.ts
nodes.summary: Standard (non-streaming) chat POST endpoint that uses a two-step LLM decision+generation pipeline to return text or widget responses.

nodes.label: app/api/chat/agent/route.ts
nodes.summary: Agentic streaming chat POST endpoint using streamText with tool use (render_widget, web_search, think) and dynamic MCP server integration.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/route.ts
nodes.summary: GET/POST endpoint for listing all chats ordered by createdAt and creating new chats.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/[id]/route.ts
nodes.summary: DELETE endpoint for removing a chat by ID.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/[id]/messages/route.ts
nodes.summary: GET endpoint that fetches all messages for a given chat ID ordered ascending by ID.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/[id]/title/route.ts
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that uses generateText to generate a 4-word AI title for a chat and persists it.

nodes.label: app/api/messages/[id]/route.ts
nodes.summary: DELETE endpoint that rewinds conversation by deleting a message and all subsequent messages in the same chat.

nodes.label: components/Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Sidebar component listing recent chats, managing MCP server configuration stored in localStorage, and allowing new chat creation.

nodes.label: components/chat/ChatWindow.tsx
nodes.summary: Main chat UI managing standard and agent modes, message state, @mention skill system, and streaming via Vercel AI SDK useChat.

nodes.label: components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders individual chat messages with markdown, syntax highlighting, tool invocation displays, and embedded widget rendering.

nodes.label: components/widgets/HtmlCanvas.tsx
nodes.summary: Widget component that renders AI-generated HTML in a sandboxed iframe with preview/code toggle and collapse controls.

nodes.label: lib/ai.ts
nodes.summary: AI model provider helper exporting getModel() used by API routes.

nodes.label: lib/db
nodes.summary: Drizzle database client instance exported as db.

nodes.label: lib/db/schema.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema defining chats and messages tables.

nodes.label: types/widget.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript types and Zod schemas for widget types (ChatMessage, HtmlCanvasParams, GravityParamsSchema, KanbanParamsSchema, DashboardParamsSchema).

nodes.label: lib/skills.ts
nodes.summary: BUILTIN_SKILLS and Skill type definitions for the @mention/skill system in ChatWindow.

nodes.label: components/widgets/WidgetRenderer
nodes.summary: Top-level widget dispatcher that selects appropriate widget component based on widget type.

nodes.label: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
nodes.summary: MCP SDK providing Client and StdioClientTransport used to connect to external MCP tool servers.

nodes.label: ai (Vercel AI SDK)
nodes.summary: Vercel AI SDK providing generateText, streamText, tool, convertToModelMessages, DefaultChatTransport.

nodes.label: @ai-sdk/react
nodes.summary: React bindings for Vercel AI SDK, provides useChat hook used in ChatWindow.

nodes.label: DECISION_PROMPT
nodes.summary: System prompt instructing IntelliRender AI to classify responses as text/gravity/kanban/dashboard/html-canvas.

nodes.label: HTML_GEN_PROMPT
nodes.summary: System prompt for standalone HTML document generation used in the html-canvas second-pass generation step.

nodes.label: SYSTEM_PROMPT (agent)
nodes.summary: System prompt for the agentic route instructing use of render_widget, web_search, and think tools sequentially.

nodes.label: render_widget tool
nodes.summary: AI tool that dispatches chart/kanban/dashboard/table/html-canvas widget rendering within the agent loop.

nodes.label: web_search tool
nodes.summary: AI tool calling Exa API (requires EXA_API_KEY) for real-time web search within the agent loop.

nodes.label: think tool
nodes.summary: AI tool for internal chain-of-thought reasoning before complex multi-step actions.

nodes.label: MCP Configuration Modal
nodes.summary: UI modal for configuring, enabling/disabling, and deleting local MCP stdio servers, persisted to localStorage.

nodes.label: Built-in Memory MCP Server
nodes.summary: Default MCP server pre-configured as 'npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory', always present in localStorage.

nodes.label: Agent Mode Toggle
nodes.summary: UI toggle in ChatWindow switching between Standard (fetch-based) and Agent Loop (streamText/useChat-based) chat modes.

nodes.label: WIDGET_REGISTRY
nodes.summary: Strongly-typed Record mapping Widget type discriminants to React component constructors, enabling exhaustive compile-time matching.

nodes.label: TextWidget
nodes.summary: Stub widget component for text type; returns null as text content is rendered by MessageBubble.

nodes.label: getModel
nodes.summary: Returns a configured chat model instance using siliconflow provider with DeepSeek-V4-Flash, forcing Chat Completions API.

nodes.label: SiliconFlow Provider
nodes.summary: OpenAI-compatible API provider hosted at api.siliconflow.com, used as the inference backend for the application.

nodes.label: Skill
nodes.summary: TypeScript interface defining a skill with name, trigger keyword, description, and prompt template fields.

nodes.label: BUILTIN_SKILLS
nodes.summary: Array of built-in skill definitions covering kanban, dashboard, gravity simulation, and interactive table triggers.

nodes.label: lib/db/index.ts
nodes.summary: Creates and exports a Drizzle ORM database instance connected to PostgreSQL via connection pool using DATABASE_URL env variable.

nodes.label: db
nodes.summary: Exported Drizzle ORM instance bound to the PostgreSQL pool and schema, used for all database queries.

nodes.label: chats table
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table representing a chat session with id, title, and createdAt timestamp.

nodes.label: messages table
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table storing chat messages with role, content, jsonb widget column, jsonb toolInvocations column, and cascade-delete FK to chats.

nodes.label: GravityParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema defining gravity simulation parameters: celestial bodies with mass, radius, color, position, and velocity vectors.

nodes.label: KanbanParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for kanban board columns containing tasks with id, title, and priority enum.

nodes.label: DashboardParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for dashboard widget with KPIs, chart configuration, and optional table data.

nodes.label: HtmlCanvasParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for html-canvas widget carrying raw HTML/CSS/JS payload to render inside an iframe.

nodes.label: WidgetSchema
nodes.summary: Zod discriminated union of all widget type schemas keyed on the 'type' literal field.

nodes.label: AIResponseSchema
nodes.summary: Top-level Zod schema combining a widget payload with a text string, representing the full AI response structure.

nodes.label: ChatMessage
nodes.summary: TypeScript type extending chat messages with optional widget, createdAt, and toolInvocations fields for agent loop support.

nodes.label: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Defines a PostgreSQL 15-alpine service named intellirender_db on port 5432 with a persistent pgdata volume.

nodes.label: extra_features_architecture.md
nodes.summary: Architecture document describing the persistence layer (PostgreSQL + Drizzle), sidebar, glassmorphism UI, and message deletion features added beyond the core proof-of-concept.

nodes.label: migration_anthropic_to_ollama.md
nodes.summary: Documents the migration from Anthropic SDK to Ollama local inference via OpenAI-compatible API, including model selection rationale (Qwen2.5-Coder over MiniCPM-V).

nodes.label: phase_2_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 2: Widget Protocol Design using Zod schemas, replacement of streamText with generateObject, and creation of widget-parser utility.

nodes.label: phase_3_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 3: Widget Renderer Architecture implementing the registry pattern and migrating ChatWindow from useChat hook to custom fetch.

nodes.label: phase_4_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 4: Full interactive Kanban widget with HTML5 drag-and-drop and Framer Motion animations.

nodes.label: phase_6_documentation.md
nodes.summary: Documents Phase 6: 3D Gravity Visualizer using Three.js, React Three Fiber, and a real-time N-body physics simulation at 60 FPS.

nodes.label: exp/colorpallet.html
nodes.summary: Experimental static HTML canvas demoing three chatbot UI color palettes (Calm & Focused, Midnight Focus, Warm & Playful) with simulated chat bubbles and hex codes.

nodes.label: exp/game.html
nodes.summary: Experimental canvas implementing Conway's Game of Life on a 60x40 DOM grid with play/pause, step, and randomize controls.

nodes.label: exp/sorting.html
nodes.summary: Experimental canvas implementing an animated Bubble Sort visualizer with 40 bars, adjustable speed slider, and play/pause/reset controls.

nodes.label: N-Body Physics Engine
nodes.summary: Client-side real-time N-body gravitational simulation using Newton's law, running at 60 FPS via useFrame with orbital trail tracking.

nodes.label: Glassmorphism UI
nodes.summary: UI design approach using backdrop-blur, translucent borders, and radial gradients for a layered frosted-glass aesthetic.

nodes.label: Drizzle ORM
nodes.summary: TypeScript-native ORM chosen over Prisma for NixOS compatibility; used for all database interactions in this project.

nodes.label: Structured AI Output (generateObject)
nodes.summary: AI SDK pattern using generateObject() with Zod schema enforcement to produce validated JSON widget payloads instead of raw text streams.

nodes.label: Widget Protocol
nodes.rationale: Structured JSON config emitted by LLM, decoded by Visual Response Engine, enables type-safe routing to interactive React components — avoids ad-hoc parsing and makes the system extensible to N widget types

nodes.label: Next.js 14 App Router
nodes.rationale: Chosen because it supports server components and modern routing conventions, enabling learning of Next.js patterns beyond the basic Pages Router

nodes.label: Discriminated Union Widget Types
nodes.rationale: Discriminated unions provide compile-time exhaustiveness checking so TypeScript catches missing widget type handlers at build time rather than runtime

nodes.label: Registry Pattern for Widget Routing
nodes.rationale: Maps string widget type keys to React components at runtime; chosen over if/else chains because it scales to N widgets without growing complexity, and TypeScript Record type enforces completeness

nodes.label: use client Directive Rationale
nodes.rationale: useChat requires use client because it maintains reactive state and interfaces with browser APIs (SSE DOM), which Server Components cannot access as they execute entirely server-side

edges.note: RootLayout wraps page children in Next.js app router

HTML_GEN_PROMPT passed as system to generateText step 2 for html-canvas

render_widget tool defined and passed to streamText

<MessageBubble> rendered per message in message list
useChat transport api: '/api/chat/agent' in agent mode
Agent mode toggle buttons in input area footer

chatId FK references chats.id with cascade delete

Defines AIResponseSchema combining widget and text fields
ChatMessage type defined inline in types/widget.ts

AIResponseSchema.widget field is typed as WidgetSchema

Doc explains the Drizzle ORM selection rationale over Prisma

Color palette experiment informed the glassmorphism UI color scheme decisions

hyperedges.relation: All three routes call getModel() from lib/ai to obtain the LLM model instance
All API routes share lib/db (Drizzle client) and lib/db/schema as the persistence layer
Chat list CRUD: Sidebar fetches and deletes chats; ChatWindow creates them via the standard/agent API routes returning chatId
Three dynamic tools registered together in the agent route's dynamicTools object and passed to streamText
HtmlCanvas is one of the widget components dispatched by WidgetRenderer and displayed inside MessageBubble
MCP server config flows from localStorage (managed in Sidebar/mcp-modal) into ChatWindow's useChat body, and then into the agent route for dynamic tool registration
Two-pass prompt pipeline in standard chat route: DECISION_PROMPT classifies intent, HTML_GEN_PROMPT generates html-canvas content
Together they form the AI structured output pipeline: types/widget.ts defines Zod schemas, lib/ai.ts provides the model, and generateObject enforces schema compliance on AI responses.
Collectively implement the persistence layer: docker-compose runs PostgreSQL, lib/db/schema.ts defines tables, lib/db/index.ts creates the Drizzle ORM connection.
The widget rendering system: WidgetRenderer dispatches via WIDGET_REGISTRY to the correct component for each widget type defined by the Zod param schemas.
Experimental HTML canvas files exploring UI concepts (color palettes), cellular automata (Game of Life), and algorithm visualization (Bubble Sort) separate from the main app.
Sequential phase documentation recording the iterative development of IntelliRender from Zod schema design through widget renderer, Kanban, and 3D gravity visualizer.
NixOS/environment compatibility layer: dns-patch.mjs fixes Tailscale DNS, migration doc records provider switch history, and lib/ai.ts holds the current working provider config.

hyperedges.label: UI Primitive Wrapper Pattern: Base UI + CVA variants + cn utility
